response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is heavily focused on full-stack web development, open-source tooling, and general software engineering, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or low-level system optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with demonstrable technical leadership
Proven ability to build and optimize high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep learning workload analysis or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS with no advanced degree or hardware-focused specialization
